user.title: Select OBD BLE Adapter
user.description: Choose the ELM327 BLE OBD adapter connected to your Nissan Leaf.  If no adapters appear, ensure the adapter is plugged in, the ignition is on, and the adapter is within Bluetooth range.

generation.title: Select Leaf Generation
generation.description:
Select your Nissan Leaf generation. This determines which sensors are created and how data is decoded.

- **ZE0 / AZE0 (2010–2018)** — uses passive CAN bus broadcast for odometer; ZE0-specific battery decoder.
- **ZE1 (2018+)** — uses active KWP2000 query for odometer; includes e-Pedal sensor.
- **Auto** — enables all sensors; uses ZE1 decoders as default.  ZE0/AZE0 owners should select their generation for correct battery data.

configure.title: BLE UUID Configuration
configure.description: Leave all values at their defaults unless your OBD adapter uses non-standard GATT UUIDs (most adapters do not).

data_description.service_uuid: GATT service UUID advertised by the OBD adapter (default matches LeLink2 / OBDBLE).
data_description.characteristic_uuid_read: GATT characteristic UUID for receiving data from the adapter.
data_description.characteristic_uuid_write: GATT characteristic UUID for sending commands to the adapter.

abort.already_configured: This OBD adapter is already configured.
abort.no_unconfigured_devices: No OBDBLE adapters were found.  Plug in the adapter, turn on the ignition, and ensure the adapter is within Bluetooth range, then try again.
abort.device_not_found: The selected adapter could not be located.

init.title: Nissan Leaf OBD BLE — Settings
init.description: Adjust polling intervals and BLE connection settings.

data_description.fast_poll: How often to poll when the car is on and in range.
data_description.slow_poll: How often to poll when the car is in range but turned off.
data_description.xs_poll: How often to poll when the adapter is out of BLE range.  HA will also trigger an immediate poll when the adapter is re-detected.
data_description.service_uuid: GATT service UUID for the OBD adapter.
data_description.characteristic_uuid_read: GATT characteristic UUID for receiving data.
data_description.characteristic_uuid_write: GATT characteristic UUID for sending commands.
